ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIU, ROY F. $6,961.29 PRINCIPAL, $2,639.57 INTEREST, $273.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,873.86, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
